transcript: So basically the current health, uh, health care system is is is more of a medical system. So most of the time when we are talking about health care care system, we are talking about improve, um, the um, efficiency, the accessibility, um, of good doctors. So what we are trying to do now is we are trying to digitize, using a different type of uh devices as well as say molecule molecular -cular profiles uh to profile the the the so called health status of uh human so that we can actually track um, how, uh, people's, uh, how people's uh health status are changing over time, um so that we can actually, um, pre- precaution on people about whether you're going to have a uh the medical event. So so the the the idea of, I think uh one, one of the direction for a future um health care system is trying to preserve people in a status of being healthy rather than, um, how we can deal with, um, the medical issues when people really get some uh severe symptom.
translation: 当前的医疗保健系统其实更像一个医疗系统。大多数时候，我们在谈论医疗保健系统时， 其实谈的是提高医生的诊疗效率，让更多人接触到优质医生资源。 我们目前正在尝试往数字化方向发展，利用不同类型的设备以及分子图谱之类的手段描绘所谓的人体健康状况， 这样我们就能真正追踪人们的健康状况随时间的变化。 这样一来，我们就能预警人们是否需要看医生。 所以我认为未来医疗保健系统的一大努力方向是，让人们保持健康状态，而不是等人们真正出现严重症状了，再去想怎么处理这些医疗问题。
Doubao_asr: So basically, the current health care system is more of a medical system, so most of the time when we're talking about health care system, we're talking about improving the efficiency, accessibility, of good doctors. What we are trying to do now is we are trying to digitize using different types of devices as well as the molecular profiles, to profile the so-called health status of humans so that we can actually track how people's health status are changing over time. So that we can actually create precautions for people about whether you're going to have medical events. I think one of the directions for future health care is trying to preserve people in a status of being healthy rather than how we can deal with the medical issues when people really get some severe symptoms.
Doubao_trans: 所以基本上，当前的医疗保健系统更像是一个医疗系统，所以大多数时候，当我们谈论医疗保健系统时，我们谈论的是提高效率、可及性、好医生的可及性。我们现在试图做的是，使用不同类型的设备进行数字化，以及分子特征，来描绘所谓的健康状况，来了解人类，这样我们就可以实际跟踪人们的健康状况是如何随时间变化的。这样我们就可以创建针对人们的预防措施，你是否会有医疗事件。所以我认为，未来医疗保健的一个方向是试图让人们保持健康状态，而不是在人们出现严重症状时如何处理医疗问题。

Um so that we can actually pre caution um people about whether you are going to have the uh the medical events. So so the the the idea of uh I think one one of the direction for future um health system is trying to preserve people in a status of being healthy, rather than um how we can deal with the medical issues when people really gets some severe symptoms.

So in that way, we are trying to improve the efficiency of the real intelligence of doctors, and we just let the digital healthcare to do most of the things based on what we call multi-dimensional profile. That is not just the biophysics and those biochemistry, POC type of things, as well as all the other genetics, this and that.
streaming_asr_0518_trans: 这不像我们。我们没有每日追踪数据，是针对整个社区的，我们也看到一些奇怪的数据，这些数据来自各处，我们会积极去获取这些数据。所以我们正在做的，是什么？我们在与很多社区医疗中心合作。我们不希望人们去医院。我们希望医院能够主动找到那些需要医院的人。所以通过这种方式，我们试图提高医生的实际效率，同时让数字医疗承担大部分工作，基于我们所说的多维档案，这不仅涉及生物物理，还有生物化学、POC这类内容，以及其他遗传学等各方面。
